case_title: ICE MACHINES INC. VS SAN FRANCISCO RESTAURANT SUPPLY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $945.47 FILED BY ICE MACHINES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESTAURANT SUPPLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
